positive: A symmetrical, stylized composition of deep space cosmic nebula art. Dominant colors are luminous royal blue, vibrant magenta, ethereal cyan, and accents of gold stardust. The main subject is a glowing, abstract celestial body merging with swirling gas clouds, depicted with clean, bold silhouettes and high contrast. The style is graphic, highly intricate, and minimalist-maximalist, suitable for screen printing. Use cosmic patterns, constellations, and geometric nebulas radiating from the center. Ideal for a full-chest placement on an apparel item. Dramatic cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, vector art quality.
negative: low quality, blur, smudge, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, boring, flat color
